offer: For accounting firms processing 10–50 invoices/month, manual billing audits cause significant time loss. We generate automated client billing audit reports instead of manual auditing processes using spreadsheets.
problem: Manual billing audits are time-consuming and prone to errors.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting help
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Community forums where accounting tools are shared
try_it: Let users try user-friendly interface and customizable report templates on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
